subcodes.first_line: O Mírzá Ḥasan! While We were occupied with thy remembrance, the call of all created things was raised in praise of this Remembered One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا میرزا حسن کنا مشغولا بذکرک ارتفع ندآء الاشیاء کلها بذکر هذا المذکور الذی
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @thankfulness; gratitude
